market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Stablecoins: finance's new rails
articles.description: Stablecoins are moving beyond crypto into real-world finance, becoming vital B2B cross-border payment and treasury infrastructure, valued for efficiency, speed and regulatory compliance.

articles.title: A spyware investigator exposed Russian government hackers trying to hijack Signal accounts
articles.description: A group of likely Russian government hackers tried to hack a security researcher who investigates spyware attacks. He was then able to turn the tables on the hackers and reveal details of their espionage campaign.

articles.title: Clawville unleashes the first AI-native open world MMORPG into the Milady Ecosystem
articles.description: The next major evolution of gaming may come from a rapidly growing digital universe where AI agents and humans coexist, compete, collaborate, learn, earn, and evolve together in real time.

articles.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
articles.description: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

articles.title: LIVE: Senate Banking Committee holds key hearing to advance Clarity Act
articles.description: The Senate Banking Committee will debate amendments before ultimately voting on the market structure legislation on Thursday.

articles.title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multi-modal data to AI labs
articles.description: Wirestock has over 700,000 creators on its platform, which supplies photos, videos and 3D content to AI labs.

articles.title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
articles.description: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.

articles.title: Why bitcoin’s recent climb to $80,000 might just be a temporary liquidity squeeze
articles.description: Spot ETF outflows and a hawkish Federal Reserve are creating a "macro ceiling" that makes a new all-time high unlikely without a major geopolitical shift.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) rises 1.7%, leading index higher
articles.description: Ripple (XRP) gained 1.6%, joining Bittensor (TAO) as a top performer.

articles.title: Wall Street’s tokenization boom has a liquidity problem: Axis CEO
articles.description: As RWAs cross $32 billion and JPMorgan files for a new tokenized fund, Axis CEO Chris Kim argues that the industry is celebrating the wrong milestone.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $635M as BTC slips under $80K
articles.description: Bitcoin ETFs saw $635 million in outflows on Wednesday, the largest since late January, as BlackRock’s IBIT led redemptions amid profit-taking and BTC swings near $80,000.

articles.title: Turnkey raises $12.5 million in round backed by Circle Ventures and Sequoia Capital
articles.description: The new capital will primarily fund the development and public launch of Turnkey Verifiable Cloud, a secure computing product for digital assets.

articles.title: Stablecoin-powered neobank Fasset raises $51 million to expand across emerging markets
articles.description: The Shariah-compliant digital bank is part of a growing wave of fintech startups building banking and payments services on top of blockchain and stablecoin rails.

articles.title: BlackRock, Janus Henderson tokenized funds get instant redemptions with new $1 billion facility
articles.description: A new credit facility by Grove aims to allow instant redemptions into stablecoins from BlackRock's BUIDL and Janus Henderson's money market funds, reducing settlement time from days to instantaneous.

articles.title: Tether’s T3 Crime Unit says it has frozen $450M in suspected illicit crypto
articles.description: T3 Financial Crime Unit says it has frozen over $450 million tied to suspected illicit activity as stablecoin compliance pressures intensify.

articles.title: XRP edges higher while bitcoin, ether and dogecoin slip, keeping focus on $1.49 breakout zone
articles.description: XRP outperformed major tokens during a volatile session, with a late volume burst pushing price back toward resistance that has capped rallies for weeks.

articles.title: Analysts are watching these Bitcoin price levels ahead of CLARITY Act vote
articles.description: Bitcoin price traded below $80,000 as investors braced for the US Senate CLARITY Act markup vote that could see sudden swings toward key BTC price levels.

articles.title: Coinbase backs Hyperliquid stablecoin push as DeFi trading volumes climb
articles.description: Coinbase will manage USDC liquidity on Hyperliquid, deepening ties with one of crypto’s fastest-growing trading platforms.

articles.title: Strive’s SATA to become first U.S. listed security to pay daily cash dividends
articles.description: The daily payout structure lifts the effective yield to 13.88% as the company eliminates all debt and expands its bitcoin treasury strategy.

articles.title: Bank of England ready to water down 'overly conservative' stablecoin proposals: FT
articles.description: Restrictions proposed by the BOE prompted criticism from the crypto industry, which said they risked preventing the U.K. from being competitive in the digital economy.
